meaning: British Institute of Management 英国管理学会 n.<口>(拉丁美洲)巴巴多斯人
examples: We asked whether people were aware of BIM.
We asked whether people would use BIM in the future.
Currently, IFC is the most widely used and most mature open standard for BIM models.
The new Giants stadium in the Meadowlands, NJ was built using BIM tools.
There is only one airport serving Bimini -- South Bimini Airport (BIM).
